business_description.nature_of_business: Boutique hotel ownership and management with integrated restaurant and event operations across Central and South Texas

coverages_discussed.current_limit: Each Occurrence 1000000; General Aggregate 2000000; Products Completed Ops 2000000; Personal Advertising 500000; Damage Rented Premises 50000; Medical Expense 10000; Deductible 5000
coverages_discussed.notes: Form Number GL 00 01 04 13. Policy number GL-HCHP-2025-3351. Endorsements listed on page 9 include CG 20 10 Additional Insured—Owners, Lessees Or Contractors—Scheduled Person Or Organization; CG 24 04 Waiver Of Transfer Of Rights Of Recovery Against Others To Us; CG 25 03 Designated Construction Project(s) General Aggregate Limit; CG 20 37 Additional Insured—Owners, Lessees Or Contractors—Completed Operations; CG 21 44 Exclusion—Designated Operations/Premises. Several endorsements shown on pages 10-14 have effective date 2026-03-15.

positives: Named insured and mailing address clearly identified
Specific SIC code and business description provided
Policy includes standard general liability limits and multiple endorsements for additional insured status and waiver of subrogation
concerns: No loss history, safety program, revenue, employee count, or location schedule provided in the document
Document appears to be a policy form rather than a broker narrative or submission memo
